description: Experience the excitement of campus life with our engaging email template, specifically designed for Higher Education events. Ideal for universities and colleges, it serves as an effective tool for student recruitment, providing all the necessary information about upcoming open days. This template is perfect for newsletter distribution and can be seamlessly integrated into your existing communication strategy. It provides an immersive preview of campus tours, showcasing the vibrant university environment. By using this template, you can keep your prospective students updated about important events, enhancing their connection with your institution. Its layout is tailored for education-related content, ensuring a comprehensive and enjoyable user experience. Discover the power of effective communication with our Higher Education Open Day email template.
short_description: Discover our engaging email template for Higher Education events. Ideal for universities and colleges, it's perfect for student recruitment, offering information on open days and campus tours. Tailored for education content, it enhances communication with prospective students.

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

html_data:
OPEN DAY

Welcome To Our Open Day On Campus!

When it comes to email marketing to prospective students, Admissions teams across the country have effectively become more agile and strategic than ever before. From the pandemic to quick pivots in campus plans and increased Summer Melt, our world in higher ed looks a little differently every day.

 
Learn More
 

Getting Started

Eager to join us in out open day? Contact us to sign up!

Learn More
 
 

Stay up-to-date with current activities and future events by following us on your favorite social media channels.

Changed your mind? Unsubscribe
